subject: Two armored figures in white and gold raising their hands toward a glowing celestial orb in a dark interior
description: Two figures stand in a darkened vaulted interior, both in white and gold armor, both with arms raised upward in a gesture of invocation or command. The figure on the left has arms spread wide and tilts their head back; the figure on the right holds a staff and reaches one hand toward a glowing orb floating above. The orb is star-shaped or sun-like, emitting white-gold light that illuminates the scene from above. The architecture is indistinct and shadowed. The mood is ceremonial and authoritative, suggesting an act of collective magical enforcement.
foreground: Two figures in white-gold armor with arms raised toward a glowing orb
background: Dark vaulted interior, shadowed stone architecture
emotion: Faces lifted in determined authority; gestures are commanding and ceremonial
